memberdef.definition: readonly unsafe ref readonly MR.Vector2i64 MR.Box2i64.this[int e]
memberdef.name: this[int e]

briefdescription.para: min/max access by 0/1 index Generated from method MR.Box2i64.operator[].
Copy contents from a wrapper class to this struct.
Generated from method MR.Box2i64.fromMinAndSize.
considering all planes with given normal and arbitrary shift: dot(n,x) = d finds the box's corner for which d is minimal Generated from method MR.Box2i64.getMinBoxCorner.
considering all planes with given normal and arbitrary shift: dot(n,x) = d finds the box's corner for which d is maximal Generated from method MR.Box2i64.getMaxBoxCorner.
Generated from method MR.Box2i64.operator==.
Generated copy constructor.
Constructs an empty (default-constructed) instance.
Generated from constructor MR.Box2i64.Box2i64.
Generated from constructor MR.Box2i64.Box2i64.
Generated from method MR.Box2i64.operator[].
true if the box contains at least one point Generated from method MR.Box2i64.valid.
computes center of the box Generated from method MR.Box2i64.center.
returns the corner of this box as specified by given bool-vector: 0 element in (c) means take min's coordinate, 1 element in (c) means take max's coordinate Generated from method MR.Box2i64.corner.
computes size of the box in all dimensions Generated from method MR.Box2i64.size.
computes length from min to max Generated from method MR.Box2i64.diagonal.
computes the volume of this box Generated from method MR.Box2i64.volume.
minimally increases the box to include given point Generated from method MR.Box2i64.include.
minimally increases the box to include another box Generated from method MR.Box2i64.include.
checks whether given point is inside (including the surface) of this box Generated from method MR.Box2i64.contains.
checks whether given box is fully inside (the surfaces may touch) of this box Generated from method MR.Box2i64.contains.
returns closest point in the box to given point Generated from method MR.Box2i64.getBoxClosestPointTo.
checks whether this box intersects or touches given box Generated from method MR.Box2i64.intersects.
computes intersection between this and other box Generated from method MR.Box2i64.intersection.
Generated from method MR.Box2i64.intersect.
returns squared distance between this box and given one; returns zero if the boxes touch or intersect Generated from method MR.Box2i64.getDistanceSq.
returns squared distance between this box and given point; returns zero if the point is inside or on the boundary of the box Generated from method MR.Box2i64.getDistanceSq.
returns the closest point on the box to the given point for points outside the box this is equivalent to getBoxClosestPointTo Generated from method MR.Box2i64.getProjection.
decreases min and increased max on given value Generated from method MR.Box2i64.expanded.
decreases min and increases max to their closest representable value Generated from method MR.Box2i64.insignificantlyExpanded.
Box given by its min- and max- corners Generated from class MR.Box2i64. This is the by-value version of the struct.
